title: Contact – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
h1: Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
text_excerpt: Contact – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Home About News In Parliament Whitestone Solar Farm Newsletter Activity Surgeries Campaigns Contact Useful Contacts Facebook Twitter Contact You can email me at [email protected] k , and your email will be processed as soon as possible. You can alternatively fill out the form below. Before we can can process your enquiry, please check that you are one of my constituents. Is Jake my MP? > Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Name * First Last Email * Telephone Street Address * Postcode * Reason for contact * I am a constituent and need Jake’s help I want to know Jake’s thoughts on a particular policy I want to volunteer or help with campaigning I want to receive Jake’s newsletter Other Comments * Submit You should also ensure that you have: Provided your full name. Provided your full postal address including post code. Provided a contact telephone number and an email address if you have one. IMPORTANT: If you have not included this information, please re-send your email as I am unable to process your enquiry without it. Email [email protected] Telephone 01909 384605 Postal Address 39 Laughton Road, Dinnington, S25 2PN Please note: The office is appointment only. If you require an appointment, please fill out the form above or email the office directly using [email protected] Facebook Twitter Jake Richards MP – Labour Member of Parliament for Rother Valley Copyright 2026 – Privacy Policy – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
